---
title: "Sensitivity specs"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Sensitivity specs}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
spec <- list(
  defaults = list(sensitivity = "sensitive"),
  files = list(
    "patients.csv" = list(
      columns = list(
        patient_id = list(role = "key", sensitivity = "sensitive"),
        sex = list(sensitivity = "public_code")
      )
    )
  )
)

write_twin_spec(spec, "twinfake_spec.json")
read_twin_spec("twinfake_spec.json")
```

`public_code` and `copy` are explicit opt-ins. Do not use them for columns that
may contain confidential labels or values.
